folio.label: 36v
folio.l: ¢ Tho cam this wooful Theaban , Palamou~
With flotry berd , and ruggy asshy heres
In clothes blake , I dropped al with teres
And passyng othere , of wepyng , Emelye
The reufullest , of al the companye
And in as meche , as the seruyse shuld be
The more noble , and riche in his degree
Duke Theseus , let forth the steedes bryng
That trapped weren , in stele al glet äyng
And couäed with the Armes , of daun Arcite
Vp on the steedes , grete and whyte
There seten folk , of which on bar his shelde
A nother his spere , vp on his hondes helde
They bar with hi~ , his bowe Turkeys
Of brend gold was the caas , & eke the harneys
And riden forth a paas , with sorweful chere
Toward the Groue , as ©e shuln after here
The noblest of the Grekys , that there were
Vp on here shuldres , carieden the bere
With slakke paas , and eyen rede and wete
Thorugú ou©t the Citee , by the maister strete
That spred was al with blak , and wonder hye
Rygút of the same , is the strete I wrye
¢ Vp on the rigút hand , went old Egeus
And on that other side , Duke Theseus
With vesseles in here handes , of gold ful fyne
Al ful of hony , melk , Blod , and wyne
Eke Palamou~ , with ful gret companye
And after æ æ cam , wooful Emelye
Witú fir in hand , as was æ tyme the gyse
To do the offise , of FuneraÂ seruyce
¢ Heigú labour , and gret apparaillyng
Was at the seruice , and the fir makyng
That with his grene top , the heuene laugút
And xx é , fadome of brede , the armes straugút
This is to seyn , the bowes were so brode
Of stree first , there was leid many a lode
¢ But how the fire , was maked vp on heigút
Ne eke the names , how the trees higút
As Oke fir , Birche , Aspe , Alder , holm , Popler
Wylew , Elmö , Plane , Assú , Box , Chesteyn , lynde , laurer
Mapul , Thorn~ , Beche , hasel , Ew , whippeltre
How they were feld , shal nat be told for me
¢ Ne how the goddes , ronnen vp and doun
Disherited , of here habitaciou~ ,
